title: 弥生賞の後に・時は金なり

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon finishes the Yayoi Sho while also
collecting her desired data.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She mutters about how she'll need it to make
proper preparations for the upcoming Satsuki Sho
before returning to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something seems to be weighing heavily on her
mind, yet she shows no intention of revealing it to
me.
